name: B.L. Stryker
overview: B.L. Stryker is an American detective drama that aired on ABC from February 13, 1989 to May 5, 1990 as part of the ABC Mystery Movie along with Gideon Oliver, Columbo and Kojak. The series was executive produced by Tom Selleck.

trailers.title: 80s Commercial | ABC Mystery Movie | B.L. Stryker | Burt Reynolds | 1989
